reasoning: I am voting for Modi's BJP because Krishak Bandhu came to my account and fertilizer prices did not kill me — the government kept its word on what matters to my four bighas. Shantanu Thakur is our candidate, and I have no complaint with him. All this Sandeshkhali drama, all this TMC fighting — it means nothing to my fields. What matters is whether the money comes on time and whether I can afford to tend my land. Modi delivered on that, so Modi gets my vote again.
primary_drivers: Krishak Bandhu and Kisan Samman Nidhi came into my account — Modi kept his word
Fertilizer prices were manageable under Modi's tenure — my fields could be tended without selling my buffaloes
Local TMC leaders became arrogant and corrupt, asking for cuts on everything — I prefer Modi's firm hand
